title: MiniMax M2.7: Run AI Agents for $20/Month?
summary: MiniMax M2.7 is a language model service designed for cost-effective AI agent deployment. In testing, it demonstrated 80%+ cost reduction compared to OpenAI and DeepSeek while maintaining performance on real-world tasks like social media drafting, translation, API scheduling, and image generation.
